description_long: This treadmill, branded with the Technogym logo, features a robust black frame with a wide, textured running belt and a raised console area. The console includes a digital display screen and several visible control buttons, likely for speed and incline adjustments, as well as an emergency stop. The handrails are thick, ergonomically curved, and extend forward from the console, providing sturdy support for users. The running belt is bordered by side rails for safety and appears to have a cushioned surface for shock absorption. The treadmill's base is solid and slightly elevated, with visible support feet for stability. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for both indoor gym and urban fitness environments.
description: A modern Technogym treadmill with a wide, cushioned running belt, digital control console, and sturdy curved handrails in a sleek black finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the treadmill, the Technogym logo, and the prominent control console with handrails.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide running belt, the dual handrails, and the digital display screen on the console.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the running belt, handrails, and control panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the treadmill's base, the back of the running belt, and the rear support structure.
attribute_control_panel: The control panel is centrally located above the running belt, featuring a digital display screen, several physical buttons, and likely an emergency stop button. The panel is integrated into the console and angled for easy access during use.
attribute_running_belt: The running belt is wide and long, with a textured, matte black surface and side rails for safety. It is centrally positioned within the treadmill frame and appears cushioned for comfort.
attribute_handrails: The handrails are thick, curved, and extend forward from the console, providing continuous support on both sides. They are smooth and appear to be made of hard plastic or coated metal.
attribute_display_screen: The display screen is rectangular, digital, and mounted at the center of the console. It is angled toward the user and shows interface elements, likely for speed, time, and other workout metrics.
attribute_power_cord: The power cord is not visible in the provided images, so its location, length, and attachment type cannot be determined.
